completed_actions: E2E testing: server boot, API CRUD, agent dispatch — all passing
3 bug fixes: Enum column type coercion, empty cwd crashing SDK, background task DB session leak
Dashboard Phase 1-4 (Jinja2): CSS rewrite, board/metrics/approvals templates, HTMX polling endpoints

dead_ends.reason: Catches /health and /api routes before FastAPI can handle them. Use explicit catch-all @app.get('/{full_path:path}') instead.

dead_ends.approach: shadcn init without Tailwind v4 + tsconfig alias prereqs
dead_ends.reason: Fails with 'No Tailwind CSS configuration found' and 'No import alias found'. Must set up @tailwindcss/vite plugin + @import tailwindcss + baseUrl+paths first.

dead_ends.approach: SQLAlchemy Enum() without values_callable=_enum_values for StrEnum
dead_ends.reason: Stores/loads by member NAME not value. 'PENDING' not 'pending'. Always pass values_callable=lambda e: [x.value for x in e] to Enum(MyStrEnum).

dead_ends.approach: AgentRunner cwd='' (empty string) passed to SDK
dead_ends.reason: anyio.open_process fails with empty cwd in some environments. Use workspace_path or None — never empty string.

next_priorities: Run frontend-design skill on BoardPage, MetricsPage, ApprovalPage for visual polish
Add React dev server to CLAUDE.md startup workflow
Consider adding approval polling (currently static load) on ApprovalPage
